steps.t: Lord Duinhir's notes can be found inside Malthellam's home in Morlad. Malthellam hopes to repair his friendship with Lady Rosfin, and has asked you to…
Lady Rosfin can be found atop Morlad outside her home. You have gathered Lord Duinhir's notes and should now return them to Lady Rosfin.
Malthellam can be found outside his house near the entrance to Morlad. You have delivered Lord Duinhir's notes and spoke to Lady Rosfin about providin…
Lady Rosfin can be found outside Malthellam's home in Morlad. Lady Rosfin has honoured Malthellam's request and has arrived to serve as his counselor.…
